name: mom_skip5d_120d
rationale: Skip-last-week 120d momentum; reduces contamination from short-term reversal and T+1 crowding while using only approved OHLCV fields.

name: risk_garman_klass_20d
rationale: Garman-Klass OHLC volatility estimator; complements close-close vol and Parkinson log-range by using open-close information.

name: rev_turnover_spike_5d
rationale: Short-term reversal conditioned on free-float turnover spike; aims to capture retail/crowding overreaction with approved fields only.

name: mom_continuous_info_252d_dir
qlib_expression: Sign(Ref(($close * $adj_factor), 1) / Ref(($close * $adj_factor), 253) - 1) * Abs((Count((Ref(($close * $adj_factor), 1) / Ref(($close * $adj_factor), 2) - 1) > 0, 252) - Count((Ref(($close * $adj_factor), 1) / Ref(($close * $adj_factor), 2) - 1) < 0, 252)) / 252)
rationale: Directional information-discreteness fix: continuous winners rank high and continuous losers rank low; current merged row loses direction for continuous losers.

name: qual_gross_profitability_ttm
qlib_expression: ((Ref($total_revenue_sq_q0, 1) + Ref($total_revenue_sq_q1, 1) + Ref($total_revenue_sq_q2, 1) + Ref($total_revenue_sq_q3, 1)) - (Ref($oper_cost_sq_q0, 1) + Ref($oper_cost_sq_q1, 1) + Ref($oper_cost_sq_q2, 1) + Ref($oper_cost_sq_q3, 1))) / ((Ref($total_assets_q0, 1) + Ref($total_assets_q4, 1)) / 2)
rationale: TTM single-quarter gross profit over average assets; replaces cum_q0/end-assets variant that remains quarter-seasonal.

name: margin_net_buy_ratio_20d_scaled
rationale: Unit-corrected margin net buy intensity: margin amounts are yuan while circ_mv is in 10k yuan.

name: flow_elg_net_pct_20d_unitfix
rationale: Unit-corrected extra-large order net inflow: moneyflow amounts are in 10k yuan while daily amount is in thousand yuan.

name: flow_inst_retail_divergence_20d_unitfix
rationale: Unit-corrected large/extra-large minus small-order divergence; keeps A-share retail-vs-institutional interaction but fixes amount scale.
